calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant rowna Wong

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is present represented by Roger Jackson, Esq.
Defendant Rowena Wong is not present.

The matter is submitted.

After reviewing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, and against Defendant Rowena Wong.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is awarded judgment against Defendant Rowena Wong as follows:

Damages/Principal: $22,530.58
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $460.00
Total Judgment: $22,990.58

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted; Declaration Of Edgar B. Lopez, Esq.; Notice Of Lodging Of Proposed Order; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo, N.A.'s motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission, Set One, to defendant Rowena Wong is granted. Wong failed to respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2033.280(a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs is deemed admitted by Wong. (CCP 2033.280(b), (c).)

Wells Fargo does not seek sanctions. But CCP 2033.280(c) provides: "It is mandatory that the court impose a monetary sanction under Chapter 7 (commencing with Section 2023.010) on the party or attorney, or both, whose failure to serve a timely response to requests for admission necessitated this motion." The court awards sanctions of $25 payable by Wong to Wells Fargo within 30 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
